segments.text: This is a recording of the lecture given by Holiness Mata Ji on 29th March 1975 at Seetom
It is a very scientific thing, the one who understands it will understand.
Have you ever seen the clock?
If we see in the clock then there is a circle which is called diameter and if it is circumference
so this has to be 22, not more or less than that because when it is 7 it becomes 22
its relationship always comes together with 22
If it is 8, then in the same proportion there will always be only one proportion left.
Now why 7 is diameter?
When diameter passes from point to middle point
Then it has got to be 7
In this way we also have to make a 7th chakra
This is inaudible.
They will not be able to understand it.
Because whatever the sages have discovered, they wrote that Kundalini is three and a half
times wrapped in one coil – there's only one kundala.
But they couldn't tell why it was like this?
Scientists can say if you wrap it in three-and-a-half times then its entire circumference
could be covered without which it cannot happen.
And from top to bottom when you give six, seven chakras are prepared.
Sahajyoga, science jaha rujya hai and science jahar har gaya hain wahan usko asha de sakta
hai.
Aur usse jata sakta hai ki jo unhone bataya hai wohi tumhari kitab hoon likha hai paribhasha
ho ka fark hai aur uska karan kya hai?
We have seen many great sages and yogis, they do not gather money here but they are a very
big people.
They live outside of their world and serve the world with vibrations only.
But we haven't seen any such person who can take up Kundalini like you all.
A sign, except Ganeshji.
The small snake in the hand of Ganeshi is a symbol for your Kundalini.
Except Ganesha and you who are my sons
My daughters
And those who were born from my family
I have not seen anyone standing on Kundalini as a sign
In this many people will say that sir how?
They worked so hard
How did they do it?
Let me tell one thing
Raja ka manthri hota hai, wo sabkut jaanta hain ki rajya ko kaisi chalaana hain.
Aur wo sara rajyaka karbhaan samartha hain, sabkut hain.
Lekin jo gharki laxmi hoti hain, raani hoti hain
wo apni chabi aapne bachon ke hatme deti hain
lekin manthari ke hat me nete.
Hongay pade likhe bahot widwan honge
hongai bahot pauncheh huye purush
lekin mere sahastrar se payda jo nahi hoon hain
Japta ko is baat ko maan nahi lete
hi wo mere betey nahi hain
unko adhikaar nahi mil satra aur milane
It's not that we go to them, we go to the Guruji, he is such a big man and you also
believe him.
But they don't know how it works like us do!
We all are aware of where we get caught in which circle or what happens
but when people act this way then circles fly away from each other
and on our signal thousands of kundalini rise up
And make everyone cross over
So why did I say so?
The reason for this was because you were born with my wisdom
There one more person named Isha Masih
who was born out of mother's heart
He too had rights
Now you are ready, now it is possible that we are ordinary people.
We're very ordinary and how can this work? I don't know but let's try to do so.
You have no doubt in your mind about the horoscopes of all these things
and understand who has got the heart chakra, what they've got
and how to remove them from their body.
You throw away thousands of ghosts, diseases etc.
I am the light and I'm the path, that's what I said, I am the destination not only the
That's why, because the previous experience was so bad, that is why I didn't talk.
You people will have to take my refuge and accept me as a mother
And you'll have give birth like sons
Without this your work cannot be done
Because of just one small reason
You all reached such stage
That great saints and Mahatmas lost
But they can not achieve it
One thing i couldn''t see from them
Another thing
That now he has become arrogant
He became a beggar
Because he crossed into ignorance
They did'nt know who his mother would be
But you have to go and that is when you have crossed.
Understand this, even a little bit
if you take steps here or there your vibrations get released
then you say, Mother if it's all pervading
how can the vibrations be released?
Even in all-pervading from where do they go?
You need to think about it
No matter wherever you live
whenever against Sahaja Yoga
no word will come out of your hands
and after that whatever work
which ever work you are doing
the ghost will support you
I have seen such people who come to my house, after that they take vibrations for a few days
and when there are some ghost problems on them then it is the work of those ghosts.
Their way becomes different their ways become different
They don't tell anything else
Then he does not see kundalini
He tells what number your horse has
What happened with you father?
How will happen about mother
He doesn' remember reality
Many such people came in our Sahajyoga and got separated
I have been doing this kind of work for a few days, I thought myself to be a Sadhu-Guru-Mahatma
and after that it was seen that the obstacles were fixed on them.
And they suffered a lot in pain and suffering.
That is why you should know one thing
by talking against Sahajyoga
even if i forgive your sins but Param Pita Paramaatma will never forgive you
In my own house at home I tell about my daughter
One day she got little angry with me
and say that forgive me, it is wrong to tell such a thing from Me.
If you have said one word against Sahajyoga
even though You are my own daughter
then also You have the right
This question has greater importance than this
That I am standing in front of You today
or Your signs
It's the fruit for Your call
See like this too
In temples & mosques
And wherever devotees call Mother
Then Mother's heart starts to beat
Have seen that whenever You sing a little song
You have also seen this, you too understand that such a thing has happened.
Today the time has come when your demand, your desire and your call came inside me.
I did not come on my own but with your calling.
Because of your unparalleled call and scream I took up this body
And even now all these people are ordinary beings
You will get to know that we have now entered a new dimension.
But the half-distance of you people can be seen by the speed of light.
You are aware, that the circle of dharma is turning upside down and you see it?
It's only possible with Sahajyoga to turn it straight but those who come in Sahaja Yoga
they need to become very religious, very truthful
I said, first you think about who identified this as Jagrutthana.
This is human chemistry that he recognized it to be Jagruthana.
He must have been a very heavy Sadhu Sant
where he must had seen the vibrations and said that it was Jagrutthana
Then when Jagrut stone has been brought
maybe someone has put his hand in it for giving shape
It may not happen
because human mind runs like its own
there's no need of touching it
After that all the priests we saw in him
Sanyasa bhi lehna wohi cheez hai aur sannyas te bhagana wohin.
Dono mein koi anta nahi hain, aap apni stithi pe khade ho jaye hain.
Pahli cheeze hai apni stheeti banaye hain.
Doosri cheeze hai apna dharma banaye hain.
Dharm ka matlab hai aap apne andar se in vibrations ko poori talaise baine diye
hain.
Aapka man hota aap kahee gaye?
Apne dekha ye aadme gire gaya.
Daur hiya usko foran pakke liye usko vibrations diyo bachaye hain.
Duniya kahegi kahene hain.
Aap ke andar se vibration bay rahe hain, yahi aapka dharma hain.
and all my efforts are futile.
This religion is not the same in this world
which talks about vibrations, means real religion
No one has ever said that there are no vibrations
everywhere it's called spirit
or water of life
but every place it says that there are vibrations
And in Hindu religion you know
how much discrimination has been done on this
by Adi Shankaracharya
He can't be taught anything
he cannot be written down
This is the source of all your problems.
It knows, it loves and it's beautiful too!
This is that power about which we have read thousands
times and we know this power a thousand times
With this very power the whole universe has been created
You are also created
And through this only you will get to know
It is a very big thing that it should spread slowly, such a big thing can't be spread
quickly.
Any life form will grow gradually but I see the roots are solidified and its root
has become very deep.
Now when I came back from Rahuli, I was so happy because the scientists there have
scientifically proved this.
They experimented on their plants to make something absolutely scientific and they
that we will fight for the government.
That this thing is true and all other untruths
are not true by giving it a name as truth
Your own power
your own power
is becoming one with that power
which is inside you
Like in Yamuna
there used to be many pots
and water would stay in those pots
when holes were formed
then only that water
of those pots would become one
If you have any questions, please do ask.
I don't know what your question is.
